response.overview: # Budak Tebing Grows Up  Budak Tebing is now entering adulthood and facing greater life challenges. Arif becomes more serious, causing Talam, who works with him, to feel pressured. Arif's relationship with Yoyol is also not what it used to be. Arif frequently gets angry when Yoyol spends too much time at Tebing. He even forbids Yoyol from befriending anyone. The appearance of Kylo, who claims to be Tongki's half-sibling, wants to reunite the Tebing kids. However, Arif misinterprets the situation. At the same time, Badas appears and frequently comes to Tebing. Badas gets close to Kylo by admitting that he was a close friend of Tongki's late father. Arif and Kylo clash again because each of them sees Badas as their adoptive father. Who is Badas really, and what is Badas's motive for getting close to these Tebing kids? Will Arif accept Kylo as a friend or a rival?
response.title: Budak Tebing 3
